blended.narrative: Apex Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
